name: terminal-error-sound
description: Plays a custom sound whenever a terminal command exits with a non-zero exit code.

terminalErrorSound.enabled.description: Enable or disable the terminal error sound notification.

terminalErrorSound.soundFilePath.markdownDescription:
Absolute path to the sound file to play when a terminal error occurs.

- **Windows**: `.wav` recommended (native); `.mp3` supported via WPF MediaPlayer.
- **macOS**: any format supported by `afplay` (`.wav`, `.mp3`, `.aiff`, `.ogg`, etc.).
- **Linux**: `.wav` / `.ogg` via `paplay`; fallback to `aplay` or `ffplay`.

Example: `C:\Users\you\sounds\error.wav`

terminalErrorSound.minimumExitCode.markdownDescription: Minimum exit code that triggers the sound. Defaults to `1` (any non-zero exit).

terminalErrorSound.volume.description: Playback volume (0.0 – 1.0). Effective on macOS (afplay) and Linux (paplay). Ignored on Windows.

terminalErrorSound.fallbackOnTerminalClo.markdownDescription:
Also trigger sound when a terminal **closes** with a non-zero exit code.

Useful as a fallback when [Shell Integration](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/terminal/shell-integration) is unavailable.
